\tzpentry{ID5751}{Helix Action Bound}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5751 introduces Helix Action Bound as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} S_{helix} = 2\sqrt{2}\cos(\phi_{helix}/2) \leq 2\sqrt{2} \end{equation}
